title: Create Furnace Lava Adapter
description: A simple block that allows for direct input of liquid lava into furnaces.
body:
Normally, you must use buckets and deal with item transport to automate furnaces using lava. This block is an adapter for pipes that allows you to easily use liquid lava for all your smelting needs.

1.5.0 Compatibility:

Vanilla: Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker

Iron Furnaces: All furnaces with any speed, type, or generator augments.

Clayworks: Kiln

Brick Furnace: Brick Furnace, Brick Blast Furnace, Brick Smoker

Create: Blaze Burner

Aeronautics: Portable Engine


![An example setup of adapters feeding furnaces and blast furnaces.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce4fff7f772662f709b6469feb2692bcaea26fbb.png)

![An example setup of adapters feeding a blaze burner and portable engine.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1611779499c550e449a51dfc570086503964ef7a.png)

![The crafting recipe for the adapter consisting of a bucket in the middle with copper sheets on top and bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35152b68cf89e6fb69fee3fb62cd4f402e34aa2b.png)
